title: salacia subalternifolia
intro: Salacia subalternifolia, also known as Bitter Chai, is a plant species in the Celastraceae family native to the tropical forests of India and Sri Lanka. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Salacia subalternifolia include its potential to aid in weight management, improve blood sugar control, and support cardiovascular health. Salacia subalternifolia is commonly prepared as a herbal tea or extract, and is also used in traditional Ayurvedic medicine to treat various ailments.
